content_body:
Our rock-themed tavern is a fun hangout for locals and visitors.  It's a laid-back, casual, and welcoming place to have delicious, fresh, regionally sourced comfort food with a pretty big twist.  

We are working closely with our food service providers to source all of our ingredients from farms as close to the tavern as possible.  We also source from local farms directly.  No Freezers, No Microwaves, No Kidding. 

 

 

Our craft bar is built around our ten beer taps (all from Georgia) and an awesome small-batch whiskey/bourbon selection.  We also carry more than 20 bottled beers and a full bar for exceptional cocktails, using juices we fresh-squeeze in-house.

We have great music, dart boards, shuffleboard tables, and Billiard Room, and we play all the big games on seven flat screens.

We built out with as much reclaimed materials as possible, use environmentally safe cleaning products and to-go containers, and use efficient Energy Star products. 

We can't wait to see y'all here for a burger and beer !!
title: Fightingtown Tavern
